title: Opportunist
effect: You have an asset on any attack roll you make against a creature that has already been attacked at some point during the round and is within immediate range. Enabler. Oratory (4 Intellect points): When speaking with a group of intelligent creatures that can understand you and aren’t hostile, you convince them to take one reasonable action in the next round. A reasonable action should not put the creatures or their allies in obvious danger or be wildly out of character. Action.
